package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for indentedjson_in_hot_path: IndentedJSON(...) used on a request path instead of compact JSON rendering.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: gin; severity: contextual.
type Rule319NegativeRecord struct {
	Name string
}

type Rule319NegativeService interface {
	Handle(context.Context, Rule319NegativeRecord) (Rule319NegativeRecord, error)
}

func scenario319Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule319NegativeService, input Rule319NegativeRecord) (Rule319NegativeRecord, int) {
	output, err := service.Handle(ctx, input)
	if err != nil {
		return Rule319NegativeRecord{}, http.StatusBadRequest
	}
	return output, http.StatusOK
}
